parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const base = 'https://ibzlykqguiqbwvkbqrau.supabase.co/rest/v1/woocommerce_products?business_id=eq.' + $json.businessId; const pn = $json.productName; if (pn) {   const words = pn.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(w => w.length >= 2);   const filters = words.map(w => 'name=ilike.*' + encodeURIComponent(w) + '*').join('&');   return base + '&' + filters + '&select=name,sku,stock_quantity,stock_status,price&order=stock_quantity.asc.nullslast&limit=10'; } else {   return base + '&stock_quantity=gte.0&stock_quantity=lte.5&select=name,sku,stock_quantity,stock_status,price&order=stock_quantity.asc.nullslast&limit=100'; } })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ business_id: $json.businessId, telegram_message_id: $json.messageId, telegram_chat_id: $json.chatId, telegram_user_id: $json.userId, message_type: $json.messageType, raw_text: $json.rawText, transcription: $json.transcription, intent: $json.intent, entities: $json.entities, response_text: $json.response, response_sent: true, processing_time_ms: $json.processingTimeMs }) }}

parameters.text:
❌ Your Telegram account is not registered with BizFlow.

Please register your business first and link this Telegram chat ID.
⚠️ Koi pending inventory alert nahi hai aaj ke liye.
